info.title: Kevel Ad APIs
info.description: Kevel (formerly Adzerk) ad serving platform APIs. Includes Management API for managing advertisers, campaigns, flights, ads, creatives, channels, sites, zones, and priorities. Decision API for ad serving decisions. User DB API for user targeting and tracking.

post.description: Request ad serving decisions for one or more placements. This is the main Decision API endpoint.

get.summary: Opt out a user from tracking
